{{Quote|Do not touch me, Jedi witch! You will not sssteal my mind from me! You will get '''nothing''' from Karnissss!|Karniss to Luminara Unduli|<ref name="r81" />}}
'''Karniss''' was a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] working for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. He led a slaver unit to the [[Wawaatt Archipelago/Legends|Wawaatt Archipelago]] during the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="r81" />

==Biography==
Karniss' unit was ambushed by the forces of [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]], [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], and [[Faie/Legends|Faie]]. His forces were overrun by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], so he called in a squad of [[LM-432 crab droid/Legends|crab droid]] reinforcements. It was then [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] swooped into the battlefield in the [[Inferno (Vilmarh Grahrk)|''Inferno'']] and took out the gargantuan crab droids with blasts from his blaster cannons.<ref name="r81" />

[[File:KarnissDeath.jpg|thumb|left|Karniss's attempt to attack the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] failed.]]
Karniss was wounded. Master Luminara and Vos confronted the dying [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] and interrogated him about the "glories to please the gods" (the purpose of the attack.) He explained that members of the [[Claatuvac Guild/Legends|Claatuvac Guild]] were hiding in a village on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], and that they knew valuable hyperspace routes which were a key secret that could bring the Separatists victory.<ref name="r81" />

As the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] spoke with [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Faie/Legends|Faie]], the dying Trandoshan gathered whatever strength he had left and pounced on a [[Clone scout trooper/Legends|clone scout trooper]], taking the dead trooper's blaster and opened fire on the strike team. His attempt failed, and Commander Faie blasted the sudden attacker.<ref name="r81" />

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 81|''Republic'' 81]] {{1st}}
